Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 877.6
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT/CORSS-COMPLAINANT/CROSS-DEFENDANT BRAYTONHUGHES DESIGN STUDIOS' Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 877.6.

The motion for good faith settlement determination is GRANTED. The settlement meets the standards of Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Associates (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488 and CCP 877.6. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
